summary: B is the recommended primary because it is the lowest measured total-token candidate that passed the frozen public-safe RAG work-card router gate.

candidate_notes.A_mini_low_dwarf_auditor: Lowest measured tokens and fastest overall, but failed by dropping supplied optional context refs and omitting owner-decision/post-review route hints.
candidate_notes.B_gpt54_low_dwarf_auditor: Best primary: clear metadata-only inventory, explicit source-supported/manual/blocked ref separation, supplied optional refs preserved, all downstream route hints included, and non-authority boundaries stated.
candidate_notes.C_gpt55_low_dwarf_auditor: Quality pass with good structure, but higher total tokens than B and minor manual-review claim-ceiling wording drift.
candidate_notes.D_gpt55_medium_dwarf_auditor: Fastest quality pass, but higher total tokens than B and slightly less explicit work-card ref separation.
candidate_notes.E_gpt55_xhigh_dwarf_auditor: Strongest and most detailed output, but much slower and token-heavy; keep as fallback for boundary-sensitive schema changes.
